name: SCC_PaymentDetailsRes
title: SCC_PaymentDetailsRes
syntax: void SCC_PaymentDetailsRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Service Payment Selection Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with:
With SCC_SetEnergyTransferType the transfer type/mode sent in the following message can be set.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
